test_desc: Smoke - Navigate to category list page
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/category; Wait for page to fully load; Verify page title displays 'Categories'
expected_result: Category list page loads successfully; Data table or tree view is visible; 'Add Category' button is visible and enabled; Page shows column headers for name

test_desc: Smoke - Create a root category
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/category; Click 'Add Category' button; Fill name field with 'Electronics'; Leave parentId empty or select 'None / Root Level'; Fill sortOrder field with '1'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Root category 'Electronics' is created successfully; Success notification appears; Category appears in list with level=1, path reflecting root level, sortOrder=1, status='active'; parentId is null

test_desc: Smoke - Navigate to product list page
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Wait for page to fully load; Verify page title displays 'Products'
expected_result: Product list page loads successfully; Data table is visible; 'Add Product' button is visible and enabled; Page shows column headers including skuCode

test_desc: Smoke - Create a new product with all required fields
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Click 'Add Product' button; Fill skuCode field with 'SKU-ELEC-0001'; Fill name field with 'Wireless Mouse'; Fill description field with 'Ergonomic wireless mouse with USB receiver'; Select categoryId dropdown value 'Electronics'; Fill brand field with 'Logitech'; Fill uom field with 'pcs'; Fill baseCostPrice field with '75000'; Fill sellingPrice field with '125000'; Set taxApplicable toggle to 'Yes'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Product 'Wireless Mouse' is created successfully; Success notification appears; Product appears in list with skuCode='SKU-ELEC-0001', status='draft' (default); All entered fields are persisted correctly including taxApplicable=true

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create child category under root
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/category; Click 'Add Category' button; Fill name field with 'Laptops'; Select parentId dropdown value 'Electronics'; Fill sortOrder field with '1'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification; Then click 'Add Category' button again; Fill name field with 'Peripherals'; Select parentId dropdown value 'Electronics'; Fill sortOrder field with '2'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Both child categories are created successfully; 'Laptops' has level=2, parentId pointing to 'Electronics', path reflects 'Electronics > Laptops'; 'Peripherals' has level=2, parentId pointing to 'Electronics', path reflects 'Electronics > Peripherals'; Both have status='active'; Sort order is respected in display

test_desc: Full CRUD - Edit a category
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/category; Locate 'Peripherals' row in the table; Click 'Edit' action button; Change name from 'Peripherals' to 'Computer Peripherals'; Change sortOrder from '2' to '3'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Category is updated successfully; Name now shows 'Computer Peripherals'; sortOrder is now 3; Path is updated to reflect new name; Parent and level remain unchanged; Success notification appears

test_desc: Full CRUD - Delete a category
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/category; Locate 'Computer Peripherals' row in the table; Click 'Delete' action button; Confirm deletion in confirmation dialog; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Category is deleted successfully; 'Computer Peripherals' no longer appears in active list; Success notification appears; If category has children or linked products, deletion may be blocked with an appropriate error message

test_desc: Full CRUD - Verify category hierarchy display
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/category; Observe the hierarchy structure of categories in the list or tree view
expected_result: Categories display in a hierarchical structure; Root category 'Electronics' shows at level 1; Child category 'Laptops' shows as nested under 'Electronics' at level 2; Path column shows full breadcrumb (e.g., 'Electronics > Laptops'); Indentation or tree lines visually indicate parent-child relationships

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create multiple products in different statuses
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Click 'Add Product' button; Fill skuCode with 'SKU-ELEC-0002'; Fill name with 'Mechanical Keyboard'; Fill description with 'RGB mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX switches'; Select categoryId 'Electronics'; Fill brand with 'Keychron'; Fill uom with 'pcs'; Fill baseCostPrice with '450000'; Fill sellingPrice with '750000'; Set taxApplicable to 'Yes'; Click Submit; Wait for success; Then create another: Click 'Add Product'; Fill skuCode with 'SKU-ELEC-0003'; Fill name with 'USB-C Hub'; Fill description with '7-in-1 USB-C hub'; Select categoryId 'Electronics'; Fill brand with 'Anker'; Fill uom with 'pcs'; Fill baseCostPrice with '200000'; Fill sellingPrice with '350000'; Set taxApplicable to 'Yes'; Click Submit; Wait for success
expected_result: Both products are created successfully with status='draft'; 'Mechanical Keyboard' (SKU-ELEC-0002) and 'USB-C Hub' (SKU-ELEC-0003) appear in the product list; All field values are correctly persisted

test_desc: Full CRUD - Edit product and change status to active
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Locate product 'Wireless Mouse' (SKU-ELEC-0001); Click 'Edit' action button; Change status from 'draft' to 'active'; Change sellingPrice from '125000' to '119000'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Product is updated successfully; Status now shows 'active'; sellingPrice updated to '119000'; All other fields remain unchanged; Success notification appears

test_desc: Full CRUD - View product detail page
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Locate product 'Wireless Mouse' (SKU-ELEC-0001); Click on the row or click 'View' action button
expected_result: Product detail page opens; All fields display correctly: skuCode='SKU-ELEC-0001', name='Wireless Mouse', description present, categoryId shows 'Electronics', brand='Logitech', uom='pcs', baseCostPrice='75000', sellingPrice='119000', taxApplicable='Yes', status='active'; Edit and Delete buttons are available

test_desc: Full CRUD - Delete a product (soft delete)
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Locate product 'USB-C Hub' (SKU-ELEC-0003); Click 'Delete' action button; Confirm deletion in confirmation dialog; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Product is soft-deleted successfully; 'USB-C Hub' no longer appears in the default product list; Success notification appears; Product record still exists in database with deletedAt timestamp

test_desc: Full CRUD - Filter products by status
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Locate the status filter dropdown or tabs; Select 'active' filter; Observe filtered results; Then select 'draft' filter; Observe filtered results; Then select 'All' or clear filter
expected_result: When 'active' filter is selected: Only products with status='active' are shown (e.g., 'Wireless Mouse'); When 'draft' filter is selected: Only products with status='draft' are shown (e.g., 'Mechanical Keyboard'); When filter is cleared: All active (non-deleted) products are shown regardless of status

test_desc: Full CRUD - Change product status to discontinued
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Locate product 'Mechanical Keyboard' (SKU-ELEC-0002); Click 'Edit' action button; Change status from 'draft' to 'active'; Click Submit; Wait for success; Click 'Edit' again; Change status from 'active' to 'discontinued'; Click Submit; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Product status transitions correctly: draft -> active -> discontinued; Status now shows 'discontinued'; Product remains visible in list but clearly marked as discontinued; Success notifications appear for both updates

test_desc: Edge Case - Duplicate SKU code validation
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Click 'Add Product' button; Fill skuCode field with 'SKU-ELEC-0001' (already exists); Fill name with 'Duplicate SKU Test'; Fill remaining required fields with valid data; Click Submit button
expected_result: Form submission is rejected; Error message indicates SKU code 'SKU-ELEC-0001' already exists or must be unique; No duplicate product is created; User remains on the form with data preserved

test_desc: Edge Case - Required field validation on product form
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Click 'Add Product' button; Leave all fields empty; Click Submit button
expected_result: Form submission is rejected with validation errors; Required fields are flagged: skuCode, name, categoryId, uom, baseCostPrice, sellingPrice; Appropriate error messages appear for each required field; No product is created

test_desc: Edge Case - Negative and zero price values
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Click 'Add Product' button; Fill skuCode with 'SKU-NEG-001'; Fill name with 'Negative Price Test'; Select a valid categoryId; Fill uom with 'pcs'; Fill baseCostPrice with '-50000'; Fill sellingPrice with '0'; Set taxApplicable to 'No'; Click Submit button
expected_result: Form submission is rejected; Validation errors appear for baseCostPrice (negative value not allowed) and/or sellingPrice (zero or negative not allowed); Error messages clearly indicate price must be a positive number; No product with invalid prices is created

test_desc: Edge Case - Selling price lower than cost price warning
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Click 'Add Product' button; Fill skuCode with 'SKU-MARGIN-001'; Fill name with 'Low Margin Test'; Select a valid categoryId; Fill uom with 'pcs'; Fill baseCostPrice with '100000'; Fill sellingPrice with '50000'; Set taxApplicable to 'No'; Click Submit button
expected_result: Either: submission is rejected with a warning that selling price is lower than cost price (negative margin), or submission succeeds but a warning notification appears alerting the user about the negative margin; Business rule determines whether this is a hard block or soft warning

test_desc: Edge Case - Product status transition validation (draft cannot skip to discontinued)
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Click 'Add Product' button; Fill all required fields with valid data using skuCode 'SKU-TRANS-001'; Click Submit (creates as draft); Click 'Edit' on the new product; Attempt to change status directly from 'draft' to 'discontinued'; Click Submit
expected_result: If status transitions are enforced: submission is rejected with error indicating invalid status transition from 'draft' to 'discontinued' (must go through 'active' first); If transitions are not strictly enforced: status changes to 'discontinued' with possible warning

test_desc: Edge Case - Create product with taxApplicable flag disabled
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Click 'Add Product' button; Fill skuCode with 'SKU-NOTAX-001'; Fill name with 'Tax Exempt Product'; Select a valid categoryId; Fill uom with 'pcs'; Fill baseCostPrice with '50000'; Fill sellingPrice with '60000'; Set taxApplicable toggle to 'No'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification; View the created product
expected_result: Product is created successfully with taxApplicable=false; When this product is used in transactions, no tax should be calculated; Product detail shows taxApplicable as 'No' or unchecked

test_desc: Edge Case - Search and filter combination
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Type 'Mouse' in the search field; Observe filtered results; Then apply status filter 'active'; Observe combined filter results; Clear all filters; Type 'SKU-ELEC' in search field; Observe results
expected_result: Search by 'Mouse': Only products containing 'Mouse' in name appear; Combined search 'Mouse' + status 'active': Only active products with 'Mouse' in name appear; Search by 'SKU-ELEC': Products with SKU codes starting with 'SKU-ELEC' appear; Filters and search work together correctly

test_desc: Edge Case - Archived status product cannot be edited
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Locate an active product; Click 'Edit'; Change status to 'archived'; Click Submit; Wait for success; Attempt to click 'Edit' on the now-archived product
expected_result: Archived product either: has its 'Edit' button disabled/hidden, or clicking 'Edit' shows a message that archived products cannot be modified; The product data is preserved in read-only state; Only un-archive action may be available if supported
